zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Katherine Howard Duchess of Bridgewater於1499年5月21日出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可索普斯時，她的父親Thomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howard56歲，母親Lady Agnes Tilney -Countess of Surrey22歲。她於1520年與Sir Rhys ap Gruffydd Fitz Uryan在英國英格蘭諾福爾可阿申維爾索普結婚。他們至少是12個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1554年5月11日在英國英格蘭素瑞藍白斯享年54歲，埋葬在英國素瑞藍白斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Katherine Howard Duchess of Bridgewater于1499年5月21日出生在英国英格兰素福爾可索普斯时，她的父亲Thomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howard56岁，母亲Lady Agnes Tilney -Countess of Surrey22岁。她于1520年与Sir Rhys ap Gruffydd Fitz Uryan在英国英格兰諾福爾可阿申維爾索普结婚。他们至少是12个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1554年5月11日在英国英格兰素瑞藍白斯享年54岁，埋葬在英国素瑞藍白斯。

nameMeanings.name: Howard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the Middle English personal names Huward (also Howard) and Heward, from Old French Huard (itself from ancient Germanic Hugihard, hugi- ‘mind, understanding, spirit’ + hard- ‘hardy, bold’). As Hugh appears in Middle English as both How and Hew, this is the definite origin of Heward and a source of Howard. This surname is also very common among African Americans. See Hugh .

English: from the Middle English personal name Haward or Howard, usually an Anglicized form of Old Danish Hāwarth (Old Norse Hávarthr, from há ‘high’ + varthr ‘guard, guardian, warden’). Alternation between Haward and Howard may have led to later confusion with Hayward .
English: occasionally a variant of   Ewart   2.

variants.name: Fogarty
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, James Patrick, Kieran, Seamus, Siobhan.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Fógartaigh ‘son of Fógartach’, a personal name from fógartha ‘proclaimed, banished, outlawed’. It is sometimes Anglicized as Howard .

variants.name: Huggard
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the medieval personal name Hugard, a variant of Huard (see Howard ). This surname is also established in Ireland (Kerry).

variants.name: Hayward
meanings: occupational name from Middle English hayward ‘keeper of the hedges and enclosures’ (Old English hēgweard), a manorial officer in charge of the common fields who protected corn and hay from cattle, theft, or damage, and supervised the harvest.

variants.name: Huard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Aime, Adelard, Jacques, Jean-Pierre, Lucien, Marcel, Alcide, Amiee, Armand, Aurele, Clermont, Fernard.
French and Channel Islands (Jersey): from the Old French personal name Huart, either identical in origin with Howard 1 or a pet form of Old French Hue .
History: Jean Huard from Courson-Monteloup in Essonne, France, married Anne-Marie Amiot in Quebec City, QC, in 1670.

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Katherine Howard Duchess of Bridgewater was born on 21 May 1499, in Thorpeness, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howard, was 56 and her mother, Lady Agnes Tilney -Countess of Surrey, was 22. She married Sir Rhys ap Gruffydd Fitz Uryan in 1520, in Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 12 sons and 8 daughters. She died on 11 May 1554, in Lambeth, Surrey, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 54, and was buried in Lambeth, Surrey, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Katherine Howard Duchess of Bridgewater est née le 21 mai 1499, à Thorpeness, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howard, avait 56 ans et sa mère, Lady Agnes Tilney -Countess of Surrey, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Rhys ap Gruffydd Fitz Uryan en 1520, à Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 12 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée le 11 mai 1554, à Lambeth, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Lambeth, Surrey, Angleterre.

de.St Michael Cornhill, London, England, Un: St Michael Cornhill, London, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Katherine Howard Duchess of Bridgewater am 21. Mai 1499 in Thorpeness, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howard 56 und ihre Mutter Lady Agnes Tilney -Countess of Surrey 22. Sie hat 1520 in Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Sir Rhys ap Gruffydd Fitz Uryan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 12 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb am 11. Mai 1554 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Lambeth, Surrey, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Lambeth, Surrey, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Katherine Howard Duchess of Bridgewater è nata il il 21 maggio 1499 nel Thorpeness, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howard, aveva 56 anni e sua madre, Lady Agnes Tilney -Countess of Surrey, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Sir Rhys ap Gruffydd Fitz Uryan nel 1520, nel Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 12 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 11 maggio 1554, nel Lambeth, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolta a Lambeth, Surrey, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Katherine Howard Duchess of Bridgewaterが1499年5月21日にイギリスイギリススフォルクソルペンエスで生まれた時，父Thomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howardは56歳，母Lady Agnes Tilney -Countess of Surreyは22歳であった。1520年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクアシュウエルソルペでSir Rhys ap Gruffydd Fitz Uryanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも12人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1554年5月11日にイギリスイギリススリーランベスで54歳で死去し，イギリススリーランベスにて埋葬された。

ko.St Michael Cornhill, London, England, Un: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 믹하얼 코른힐
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Katherine Howard Duchess of Bridgewater(이)가 1499년 5월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 소네스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howard(은)는 56세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Agnes Tilney -Countess of Surrey(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1520년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 애슈웰소에서 Sir Rhys ap Gruffydd Fitz Uryan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1554년 5월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 수리 램스에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수리 램스에 묻혔다.

pt.21 May 1499–11 May 1554: 21 de maio de 1499–11 de maio de 1554
pt.St Michael Cornhill, London, England, Un: St Michael Cornhill, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Katherine Howard Duchess of Bridgewater nasceu em 21 de maio de 1499, em Thorpeness, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howard, tinha 56 anos e sua mãe, Lady Agnes Tilney -Countess of Surrey, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Rhys ap Gruffydd Fitz Uryan em 1520, em Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 12 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 11 de maio de 1554, em Lambeth, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em Lambeth, Surrey, Inglaterra.

ru.St Michael Cornhill, London, England, Un: ст мачаел корнилл, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Katherine Howard Duchess of Bridgewater родилась 21 мая 1499 г. в местности таурпинесс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howard было 56 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Agnes Tilney -Countess of Surrey, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Rhys ap Gruffydd Fitz Uryan в 1520 г. в местности ашвеллтаурп, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 12 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она умерла 11 мая 1554 г. в местности лэмбет, сурри, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности лэмбет, сурри, Англия.

es.21 May 1499–11 May 1554: 21 de mayo de 1499–11 de mayo de 1554
es.St Michael Cornhill, London, England, Un: St Michael Cornhill, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Katherine Howard Duchess of Bridgewater nació el 21 de mayo de 1499, en Thorpeness, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Howard 2nd Duke of Norfolk 1st Earl of Surrey 13th Baron Segrave 12th Baron Mowbray Kg Earl Marshal Howard, tenía 56 años y su mamá, Lady Agnes Tilney -Countess of Surrey, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Sir Rhys ap Gruffydd Fitz Uryan en 1520, en Ashwellthorpe, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 12 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 11 de mayo de 1554, en Lambeth, Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultada en Lambeth, Surrey, Inglaterra.
